title: OSF Business Profile (v3, IT-Edge Welle 1)
description: Schema for files under profiles/business/*.json — used by IT-Edges (PostgreSQL pollers) to type event-world entities. Strict separation from telemetry (machine BDE/ProcessData).

profileId.description: Globally unique profile ID, prefix SMProfile-

category.description: Business profiles only — telemetry profiles live in profiles/machines/.

abstract.description: Abstract parent profiles (e.g. SMProfile-Order) are not instantiated directly; concrete children declare parentType to inherit attributes. Mirrors the same flag on machine-profile-schema.json.

delivery.description: Wire-Klasse. Bei business-Profilen per Konvention immer 'transactional' (JetStream Pub-Ack + Outbox-Retry) — trotzdem required, kein Default.

scope.description: Scope. Bei business-Profilen per Konvention immer 'hub' (Event-Welt landet auf der .150) — trotzdem required, kein Default.

promotion.description: Promotion-Trigger. IT-Edge-Attribute sind typ. on_change (Poller erkennt Aenderung) — required, kein Default.
